results.rendered_html:
bhṛta p. p. [bhṛ-kta]
1 Borne.
2 Supported, maintained, cherished, fostered.
3 Possessed, endowed or furnished with.
4 Full of, filled with.
5 Hired.
— taḥ A hired servant; hireling, mercenary; uttamastvāyudhīyo yo madhyamastu kṛṣīvalaḥ . adhamo bhāravāhī syādityevaṃ trividho bhṛtaḥ Mīt.
